chinese_news.title: Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang：中国卖家，正在涌向俄罗斯｜专访
chinese_news.summary:
编者按：上个月月底，36氪在厦门参加了一场Ozon全球招商启动大会，我们发现现场人山人海。火热的出海和国内经济形成鲜明对比，特别是一组数据吸引了我们注意：尽管俄罗斯电商渗透率在2025年才23%，但是Ozon在2017年至2025年间，实现了91%的年均复合增长率。

这些高增长数据背后，似乎隐藏着比较大的商业机会，但机会究竟是什么？中国卖家如何在AI时代抓住？那边电商处于什么阶段？带着这些疑问，36氪和Ozon大中华区总裁Simon Huang（黄效）进行了一次交流。结论就是：俄语区还有比较长的红利期，中国电商迁移过去有足够的品牌优势、供应链优势，以及运营优势。以下为正文：

过去几年，中国跨境电商最拥挤的地方，是欧美。

以深圳坂田、龙华、华强北为代表的无数跨境卖家，围绕亚马逊、独立站、TikTok Shop和Temu，构建起了一整套成熟的方法论：选品、投流、铺货、品牌化、海外仓、达人营销……。可以说，中国供应链几乎把全球电商卷了个遍。

但202

chinese_news.title: 融资超亿元、割草机器人公司拿下数亿订单，瞄准庭院具身终端｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，智能庭院机器人公司「长曜创新」近日完成数千万元A+融资，领投方为美的系上市公司盈峰环境，老股东XGROUP持续加注。资金将重点投入技术研发迭代、多SKU量产交付及产品矩阵拓展，持续夯实供应链能力，完善全球化渠道布局。此前，公司已于2025年12月完成A轮融资，半年累计融资金额超亿元。

长曜创新成立于2022年，长期专注户外庭院智能硬件赛道，聚焦无边界割草机器人的研发、设计与制造。公司依托自主技术研发与场景化创新能力，围绕草坪养护场景，构建庭院智能全生态系统。

根据Euromonitor等报告显示，2024年，全球割草机器人销售额占割草机总额的9.1%，处于较低水平。分区域看，欧洲市场存量渗透率达20%-30%，普及率较高，但无边界产品替代空间依然广阔；北美家庭草坪面积大、地形复杂，渗透率不足2%位数，是未来扩容的关键市场。

随着庭院机器人市场持续升温，竞争日趋白热化。面对日益同质化的价格战与功能堆叠，市场分化的背后，是现有产品力难以匹配用户的深层需求。长曜

chinese_news.summary:
撰文｜锅包柚

封面来源｜Unsplash（AI辅助扩图）

五一假期已经结束，但打工人的“节后综合症”并未消退。

面对永远99+的工作群消息，和改不完的PPT，打工人蝈蝈在摸鱼时打开灵光APP里的一个小游戏——“老板被我fire了”。

屏幕里跳出老板最爱的PUA话术：“你们要相信我的眼光”“现在的付出都是值得的”。她疯狂点击，伴随着金币掉落的音效，在赛博世界里体验了一把将老板痛扁、原地暴富的爽感。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 航空航天电气系统互联组件方案商获数千万融资，细分赛道市占率第一
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | ���斯来

硬氪获悉，青岛北辰航天航天科技有限公司（下称“北辰航天”）近日完成数千万元天使轮融资，由云启资本独家投资，翊荣资本担任长期独家财务顾问。

北辰航天旗下全资子公司青岛北辰数智科技有限公司成立于2014年，长期深耕航空航天电气系统互联组件研制领域，提供从设计到组装的系统工程解决方案。

电气系统互联是航天器的五大核心组成之一，类似于人体的“神经与血管”，承担电源分配、信号传输、测量控制等关键功能，具有高复杂度与高可靠性要求。随着商业航天、深空探测及低空飞行器的发展，仪器布局与电气系统互联（电缆网）敷设设计及配套电气系统互联组件产品正迎来新的需求增长。

据了解，北辰航天早期即以体制内外协方身份参与航天领域电气系统互联系统设计，深度参与多项运载型号的三维设计工作，技术成熟度行业领先。

经过十余年积累，北辰航天已具备面向航空航天企业的全流程一站式服务能力，从设备构型布局、电

chinese_news.title: 获高秉强、蓝驰领投数千万融资，浙大00后创业者从远景观测切入AI智能影像｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，星识（宁波）科技有限公司（以下简称“星识科技”）近日连续完成天使+轮和天使++轮融资，累计金额达数千万元。两轮融资分别由高秉强教授旗下高锋耐心资本和蓝驰创投领投、松禾资本跟投，老股东清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛持续加注。本轮资金将主要用于智能影像核心技术研发、新品矩阵打造和产品体验的迭代优化，以及生产体系与供应链能力建设。此前，公司已获得李泽湘教授旗下宁波智能技术研究院、清水湾二期基金及奇绩创坛的种子轮及天使轮投资。

星识科技是一家专注智能影像技术研发与硬件制造的企业，以远景观测场景为切点，曾推出融合AI功能的Vizta智能望远镜，已在Kickstarter和Indiegogo众筹达数百万元。

望远镜作为长期被传统光学巨头主导的市场，正在被新生代创业者以消费级的智能化产品重新撬动。星识科技巧妙地通过结构设计与AI算法创新，将手机变为智能望远镜，不仅低成本、高效地实现了远景观测和拍摄的一体性，还通过AI功能进一步降低了产品操作门槛、丰富了产品玩法和趣味性。这种软硬件融合的创新解决

chinese_news.title: 「维新宇航」完成数千万元天使+轮融资，7座3吨级eVTOL将于7月进行首飞测试｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文 | 阿至

36氪获悉，低空出行产品研制商「维新宇航」已完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮融资由策源资本领投、金舵投资跟投，资金将主要用于加速公司首款主力机型 Vector 5的研发迭代、首飞测试与适航取证进程。

维新宇航成立于2023年，是36氪长期关注的企业，其专注于大载客量、大载重eVTOL/eCTOL产品的研发及制造。加上6个月前连续完成的种子轮、天使轮，目前维新宇航已完成三轮融资，累计资金交割总额超亿元人民币。

现阶段，维新宇航的主力机型Vector 5为一款7座3吨级纯电复合翼eVTOL，该机型专注于应急救援和医疗急救等民生刚需场景，最大起飞重量为3180kg、最大载荷为680kg，最大航程300km、最高巡航速度为 250km/h，全尺寸样机已于去年6月正式下线。

chinese_news.title: 卡位黄金价格带，问界M6向下争夺年轻群体｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
2026年的中国新能源SUV市场正经历着前所未有的内卷。

问界依托华为技术体系，推出了定位更亲民的全新车型 M6， 瞄准主流家用消费群体。放在问界品牌整体销量连续数月下滑、赛力斯盈利能力承压的背景下，M6的到来既是“救兵”，更是一场不容有失的“大考”。

卡位黄金价格带，向下争夺年轻群体

从产品命名逻辑看，M6位于M5与M7之间，车身尺寸为4960×1985×1736mm，轴距2950mm，属于标准的中大型五座SUV。官方定位为“新锐智慧SUV”，目标用户从问界以往的主力“30岁以上家庭用户和商务人群”向下延伸至25-35岁城市年轻群体。

25-30万元是目前中国新能源SUV市场竞争最激烈的价格带——特斯拉Model Y、理想L6、小鹏G6、比亚迪唐等车型均在此区间鏖战。作为参考，理想L6起售价24.98万元，小鹏G6起售价20.99万元，Model Y后驱版26.35万元。问界M6以25.98万元起售，锚定的正是理想L6的核心区间，试图以更低门槛的增程方案和更激进的全系标配策略争夺年轻家庭用户。

prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Saylor signaling fresh BTC accumulation after Q1 selling hints; $80K support holding into weekly close despite trader bearishness creates asymmetric risk setup.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Saylor signals another Bitcoin buy); CoinDesk (Bitcoin holds $80K into weekly close)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum underperform Bitcoin by >40% through end-2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: ETH already down 35% vs BTC year-over-year; traders debating whether downtrend continues amid shifting capital allocation to BTC and AI tokens.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (Ethereum down 35% versus Bitcoin; Will the ETH price downtrend continue?)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Netflix's ad-tier monetization exceed ad-free tier revenue by Q4 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Netflix moving standard plan to $20 ad-free; streaming economics nearing inflection where cheaper ad-supported tiers generate equal or superior ARPU.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Netflix new ad-free standard plan at $20, streaming's tipping point into old TV)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will crude oil price remain above $85/bbl through end-Q2 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Iran-Israel conflict now in second month with no resolution signals; Trump rejecting Iranian peace offers keeps geopolitical risk premium elevated.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Iran war dragging into second month, spiked oil and gas prices); BBC (Trump calls Iran response 'totally unacceptable'; Lebanon Israeli strikes continue)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Trump secure a Ukraine-Russia ceasefire agreement by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Putin signals conflict 'coming to an end' with potential for negotiations; Trump administration actively seeking endgame but faces Zelensky backing complications.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: BBC (Putin says Ukraine conflict 'coming to an end'; Trump rejects Iranian offer)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Alphabet (GOOGL) stock close 2026 higher than $160 (current implied valuation post-160% rally)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or CNBC closing price on 2026-12-31
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market has priced in Google's AI dominance narrative and search moat defensibility; limited upside embedded at current levels given the 160% run already reflected.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC reports Google now seen as clear AI winner owning 'most of the stack'; but rally may stall at current valuations absent major gemini/product breakthroughs.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US retail job growth remain positive (net adds >0) in August 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: BLS monthly employment report for August 2026 (retail trade sector)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: May 2026 saw +22K retail adds (1/5 of total jobs) but consumer warning signs emerging; prediction markets undershooting odds of late-summer contraction as consumer spending cools.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC cites retailers on hiring spree despite consumer warning signs; used car prices falling, EV interest rising as affordability stress mounts.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ozon (Russian e-commerce) reach 35% digital commerce penetration in Russia by end-2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Ozon investor reports, Statista, or Russian e-commerce industry tracking
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese sellers flooding Ozon; platform grew 91% CAGR 2017-2025 despite 23% penetration as of 2025. Second-order market opportunity underappreciated in Western prediction markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr reports massive Ozon conference in Xiamen with record attendance; Chinese sellers pivoting Russia en masse. This narrative not yet surfaced in English media.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will US median new car payment exceed $550/month by July 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Cox Automotive monthly auto loan report or Edmunds median payment tracker
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Payments already jumped $390→$525 since 2019; oil spike (from Iran conflict) will pressure gas costs further, shifting EV demand but sustaining payment pressure on broader market.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC notes used car affordability crisis drives demand; Capital One data suggests stability but masks distributional stress on lower-income buyers.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will crypto regulatory clarity (Senate Clarity Act) be enacted into law by November 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Congress.gov bill status; official Senate/House passage vote record
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Senate Clarity Act markup resumes; crypto industry cheering. But binary passage odds underestimate election-cycle delays and competing priorities in broader legislative queue.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk reports Clarity Act markup date set as market structure push resumes; industry optimism high but typical legislative velocity suggests Q4 2026 is aggressive deadline.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC/USD on geopolitical risk premium (Iran-Israel conflict extending through Q2) and Saylor accumulation signaling; target $95K+ by June 2026.
supporting_signals: Saylor signals fresh Bitcoin accumulation after Q1 selling hints (Cointelegraph)
Iran war in second month with Trump rejecting peace offers; oil elevated (CNBC, BBC)
Bitcoin holds $80K support into weekly close despite trader skepticism (Cointelegraph)
investment_theses.counter_view: Traders warning BTC dip not yet over; ETH correlation breakdown and retail job softness could trigger risk-off liquidations.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or 3-month BTC/USD futures; alternatively long BTC call spread (90K/100K Jun expiry) to cap cost against Saylor accumulation signal.

investment_theses.thesis: Short SPY / rotate to defense (XLE oil exposure, long gold) if May 2026 consumer warning signs (retail hiring on warning signals) confirm June contraction.
supporting_signals: Retailers on hiring spree but consumers sending warning signs (CNBC)
Used car prices falling for first time in 2026; affordability a key concern (CNBC)
Oil elevated from Iran conflict, pressuring discretionary purchasing power (CNBC, BBC)
investment_theses.counter_view: Capital One data suggests auto loan stability and income ratios are manageable; consumer resilience overstated but not broken yet.
investment_theses.expression: Short SPY Jun/Jul call spreads (530/540 strikes); long XLE Jun calls (80 strike); long GLD Jun calls (200 strike). De-risk if Fed signals pivot.

investment_theses.thesis: Long Netflix short-form ad-tech (NFLX call spreads) betting ad-tier ARPU will exceed premium tier by Q4 2026 as $20 standard plan launchers.
supporting_signals: Netflix moving standard to $20 ad-free; streaming approaching old-TV monetization inflection (CNBC)
YouTube strategist ecosystem booming (MrBeast advisors); proves creator/ad economics viable (CNBC)
Emerging-market users treating crypto exchanges like banking apps (Binance remark) signals ad-tier adoption mindset shift (Cointelegraph)
investment_theses.counter_view: Premium-tier churn may accelerate if advertising degradation is perceived; NFLX valuation already pricing upside.
investment_theses.expression: Long NFLX Dec 2026 call spread (250/270 strikes); or synthetic long via long calls + short puts (260 strike Dec expiry).

investment_theses.thesis: Long emerging-market e-commerce exposure (China cross-border via Ozon, Lazada, SEA platforms) on Chinese seller migration and 91% CAGR Ozon growth runway.
supporting_signals: FLAG (36Kr): Massive Ozon conference in Xiamen, record Chinese seller migration to Russia; platform achieved 91% CAGR 2017-2025 (36Kr Ozon interview)
Chinese NEV makers (XPEV, Li Auto) eyeing Russia; supply-chain localization underway (implicit in Ozon growth narrative)
Emerging-market users treating exchanges like banking infrastructure (Binance, Cointelegraph) — same user behavior pattern fueling Ozon adoption
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical risk (US-Russia sanctions escalation) could disrupt supply chains and payment rails unexpectedly.
investment_theses.expression: Long SEA (Sea Limited) ADRs, or if direct Ozon play unavailable, build long Asia-ex-Japan small-cap e-commerce ETF (e.g., ASHR) overweight to Chinese exporters.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC volatility / short ETH/BTC ratio through June 2026 as capital rotates from Ethereum to Bitcoin and AI-native tokens (ZANO, SUI, SWEAT trending).
